appDesc.message: Ku soo celi YouTube naqshadeeda caadiga ah (ka hor dhammaan geesaha wareegsan & nacaybka qarsoon) + dib-u-cusbooneysiinta YouTube Shorts + waxay xannibtaa xayeysiisyada thumbnail

helptip_restoreDislikes.message: Muuji tirooyinka nacaybka ah adoo adeegsanaya Xogta Soo Celinta YouTube Dislike

helptip_unroundCorners.message: Meelaha geeska ah ee ku wareegsan walxaha UI

helptip_disableShorts.message: Ku wareeji Shorts ciyaaryahan weyn classic

helptip_shortsBlock.message: Qari Shorts si ay u muuqdaan in page Home + natiijooyinka

helptip_playablesBlock.message: Qari Playables si ay u muuqdaan in page Home

helptip_adBlock.message: Qari thumbnails xayeysiis ah oo ka socda qaababka bogga guriga

helptip_aiBlock.message: Qari walxaha AI ee guriga + bogagga fiidiyowga
